description: Short-term measure of the strength and pressure of ETF flows into or out of the specified ticker, typically reflecting mechanical supply/demand over a horizon less than one week
Medium-term measure of ETF flow strength and pressure for the ticker, indicating mechanical effects over approximately one to two weeks
Long-term measure of the strength and persistence of ETF flows into or out of the ticker, representing mechanical crowding effects over a horizon of about three weeks or more
Unix timestamp marking the exact time at which the data was considered valid or created by the vendor
